--- 
title: "OpenRefine"
software:
- '[OpenRefine](https://openrefine.org/)'
login:
- webapp-sso
os_flavor: linux
os:
- Ubuntu 22.04
packages: []
gpu: false
admin: true
support: UU
---

## Description

OpenRefine is a powerful free, open source tool for working with messy data: cleaning it, transforming it from one format into another, and extending it with web services and external data.

Each logged-in user on this workspace gets their own instance of OpenRefine.

Login is done via [SRAM](https://servicedesk.surf.nl/wiki/spaces/IAM/pages/74226073/SURF+Research+Access+Management).

## Creation

{{< include ../partials/_storage.qmd >}}

{{< include ../partials/_creation.qmd >}}

{{< include ../partials/_request-access.qmd >}}

## Access

{{< include ../partials/_access-sso.qmd >}}

{{< include ../partials/_data_transfer.qmd >}}

## Usage

After logging in, OpenRefine will be accessible through your web browser. 

### Getting Started

1. Click `Create Project` to upload your data file (supports CSV, Excel, JSON, XML, and more)
2. Preview and configure import options
3. Start cleaning and transforming your data

For detailed guides on using OpenRefine's features, see the [OpenRefine documentation](https://openrefine.org/docs).

## Tips
{{< include ../partials/_sudo-rights.qmd >}}
